reason: council 3/3 endorsed additive edits (defer, tool_response tool-specific, warn-path systemMessage-vs-additionalContext, jq fail-open caveat, full-event-set rephrase, timeout note) — delta +0.125 clean, with_skill never loses an assertion (wins eval-1/eval-2). But the 4 eval cases test hook-authoring Opus does unaided AND none exercise the new content, so blind winner != with_skill. Edits preserved at scratchpad/hookify-edits.patch. PROPOSED new eval cases (need sign-off): (1) warn-without-blocking → must use additionalContext to steer Claude, not systemMessage; (2) PostToolUse follow-up reading tool_response; (3) a guard that must fail-closed on missing jq. REVERTED to unblock the sweep; re-apply patch + add cases after user checkpoint
title: eval set does not discriminate hookify on a strong model; blind A/B not winnable (2-2 then 1-3 de-contaminated); needs discriminating cases + user checkpoint
